parts.text: Give me five blog topics for our product launch.

1. How we built a multi-agent platform in six months
2. Why we bet on open-weight models for our launch
3. The unexpected lessons from our beta program
4. How primer makes your agents observable by default
5. From prototype to production: our infrastructure story

# The unexpected lessons from our beta program

## Setting the scene
What we shipped vs. what we thought we were shipping.

## Lesson 1 - Users ignored the features we were proudest of
The feature that took two weeks sat untouched; the one-liner shortcut was used constantly.

## Lesson 2 - Observability is not optional
When an agent silently fails, no one knows why - and they blame the product, not the model.

## Lesson 3 - Feedback loops collapse iteration time
Teams that ran daily retrospectives shipped usable agents twice as fast.

## What we changed before launch
Three concrete adjustments that came directly from beta feedback.

items.description: Brainstorms blog post topics for a theme
system_prompt: You suggest sharp, specific blog post topics for a given theme.
Return a numbered list of five. No preamble.

items.description: Turns a chosen topic into a structured outline
system_prompt: You turn a single blog topic into a tight outline: a working title, three to five section headings, and one line under each.
